docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBERT, JASON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO AUG-16-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE TODAY. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUBBERT, JASON $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,625.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
